current_commit_message: Add unit tests for sanitizing file paths
Add tests for recursive string interpolation function
Loosen version requirements for dependencies in setup.py
Make long description agnostic to current directory
Use kwargs for configuration of DICOMSorter
Add utils test to include new functions
Fix bug in string interpolation for age
Run black to reformat all files
Add mypy configuration and types throughout
Ensure license and type information is included in the package
Ensure we enable freeze support for pathos when running on windows
Do not use multiprocessing when concurrency = 1
